name: public_safety_heat_dome_stresses_harbor_ind_col
premise: Mutual-aid crews from another county arrived with incompatible radio encryption; command needs a comms decision now. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety heat dome stresses harbor ind col has converged with local pressure in the Kestrel Ridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both individual and collective; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Sana Bennett
agents.identity: I am Sana Bennett, the accountable executive on this bridge in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Elliot Chandra
agents.identity: I am Elliot Chandra, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect collective.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to collective to secure individual before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Sana Bennett must choose under individual versus collective. What does Sana Bennett do?
